M4: Filter People by Last Outreach Date

Touchpoint Date Filtering — Verified with Real Data
Friday, February 27, 2026 at 4:37 PM
FILTER WORKS: Grid reduced from 24 to 17 people (7 filtered out)
Filter Reduction — Measured Row Counts
Step Filter Applied People Change Visual
01 No filters (baseline) 24 —
04-05 After: Jan 31, 2026 17 -7
07 After + Before: Feb 23, 2026 15 -9
08 Has Touchpoints + Date Range 11 -13

Screenshots
Test Configuration Browser: Chromium (Playwright headless)
Target: http://localhost:8080/projects/26/grid (All Stages tab)
Auth: pablo@betterway.dev (development database)
Backend: Xano development branch — API group (canonical: _dY_2A8p)
Endpoint: GET /association/project/{id}/people?touchpoint_after=...&touchpoint_before=...
Features tested: After date picker, Before date picker, Has/None dropdown, Active badge, Clear All, date range filtering

01 — Grid Baseline (No Filters)

PASS
Prospects Grid View loaded for demo project. "All Stages" tab selected. Advanced Filters panel is expanded showing the Touchpoints section with "Any" dropdown and "After..." / "Before..." date picker buttons. No filters active.
MEASURED: 24 people in grid
  • Page loads at /projects/26/grid without errors
  • Advanced Filters section is visible and expanded
  • Touchpoints filter shows: Any dropdown + After... + Before... buttons
  • No "Active" badge — no filters are set
  • All 24 prospects/candidates are visible in the grid
Grid with no filters — 24 people shown

02 — Touchpoints Filter Section

PASS
Close-up of the filter panel showing the new Touchpoints filter section. It spans 2 columns and contains three controls: a compact "Any/Has/None" dropdown, an "After..." date picker button, and a "Before..." date picker button. Both date pickers use CalendarIcon and show placeholder text.
  • Touchpoints section spans 2 columns in the grid layout
  • Has/None dropdown renders with "Any" default value
  • After date picker button shows "After..." placeholder
  • Before date picker button shows "Before..." placeholder
Touchpoints filter section with dropdown + two date pickers

03 — After Date Picker Calendar

PASS
Clicking the "After..." button opens a Calendar popup (shadcn/ui Calendar using react-day-picker). Navigated to January 2026 to select Jan 31 as the "contacted after" date.
  • Calendar popup appears when After button is clicked
  • Calendar shows month with navigation arrows
  • Day buttons are clickable
After date picker — calendar popup open, selecting Jan 31

04 — After Date Applied — FILTER REDUCES RESULTS

PASS
After selecting Jan 31, the After button shows the formatted date. "Active" badge appears. The API sends touchpoint_after parameter. Grid re-fetches and shows FEWER people.
MEASURED: 24 → 17 people (7 filtered out)
  • After button shows formatted date
  • "Active" badge appears next to Advanced Filters
  • "Clear All" button becomes visible
  • API request includes touchpoint_after parameter
  • Grid reduced from 24 to 17 people
After date applied — grid reduced from 24 to 17 people

05 — Grid Results With After Date Filter

PASS
Grid showing filtered results. With touchpoint_after set, only people whose most recent touchpoint is after that date are displayed. People with no touchpoints are excluded.
MEASURED: 17 people (was 24)
  • Grid shows 17 people instead of 24 (filtered)
  • Only people with recent touchpoints appear
  • People with no touchpoints are excluded from results
  • Touchpoints column shows dates after the filter date
Grid filtered by After date — 17 of 24 people shown

06 — Before Date Picker Calendar

PASS
With After date already set, clicking "Before..." opens a second Calendar popup. This creates a date range — "contacted between After and Before".
  • Before calendar popup opens alongside existing After filter
  • After date remains displayed in its button
  • Both calendars can be used to create a date range
Before date picker open — creating a date range

07 — Both Dates Active — Date Range Filter

PASS
Both After and Before dates set, creating a date range. "Active" badge confirms filters are active. API receives both touchpoint_after and touchpoint_before. Grid shows only people contacted within this window.
MEASURED: 15 people (was 24)
  • After and Before dates both displayed
  • "Active" badge visible
  • API receives both touchpoint_after and touchpoint_before params
  • Grid reduced to 15 people (from 24 baseline)
Both dates set — 15 of 24 people match date range

08 — Combined: Has Touchpoints + Date Range

PASS
Touchpoints dropdown changed to "Has" in addition to date range. Combines has_touchpoints filter with date filters. Only people who HAVE touchpoints AND whose last touchpoint falls within the date range are shown.
MEASURED: 11 people (was 24)
  • Touchpoints dropdown shows "Has" (highlighted)
  • After and Before dates remain set
  • Grid shows 11 people matching all three criteria
  • API sends has_touchpoints=yes along with date params
Has touchpoints + date range — 11 of 24 people (narrowest filter)

09 — Clear All Filters — Back to Baseline

PASS
Clicking "Clear All" resets all filters. Date pickers return to "After..." / "Before..." placeholders. "Active" badge disappears. Grid restores the full list.
MEASURED: 24 people (restored from 11)
  • After button shows "After..." placeholder
  • Before button shows "Before..." placeholder
  • Has/None dropdown shows "Any"
  • "Active" badge disappears
  • Grid shows all 24 people again (same as baseline 24)
All filters cleared — grid restored to 24 people
